completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: desktop (PySide6)
Found 12 existing docs (README, CLAUDE.md, PRD, architecture, UX spec, product brief, research reports, sample BOMs)
Tech stack: Python 3.10+, PySide6 6.10.2, httpx, keyring, kicad-python, hatchling build
Exhaustive scan: 16 source files (~1870 lines), state management via Qt signals, 11 GUI widgets, 7 core classes
Source tree documented with annotations for all critical folders
Dev setup: pip install -e ., python -m kipart_search. No CI/CD, no deployment config
Architecture doc written: layered pattern, core/GUI separation, plugin sources, signal/slot state
Supporting docs written: project-overview, source-tree-analysis, component-inventory, development-guide
Master index generated with links to all generated and existing docs

findings.project_classification: Monolith desktop app, Python 3.10+, PySide6 GUI with core/GUI separation
